name: Cyberdark End Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>鎧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>皇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－サイバー・ダーク・エンド・ドラゴン
name_jp_tl: Armored Emperor Dragon - Cyber Dark End Dragon
desc:
"Cyberdark Dragon" + "Cyber End Dragon"
Must be either Fusion Summoned, or Special Summoned by Tributing 1 Level 10 or lower "Cyberdark" Fusion Monster equipped with "Cyber End Dragon". Unaffected by your opponent's activated effects. Once per turn: You can equip 1 monster from either GY to this card. This card can attack a number of times each Battle Phase, up to the number of Equip Cards equipped to it.
mnst_eff:
"Cyberdark Dragon" + "Cyber End Dragon"
Must be either Fusion Summoned, or Special Summoned by Tributing 1 Level 10 or lower "Cyberdark" Fusion Monster equipped with "Cyber End Dragon". Unaffected by your opponent's activated effects. Once per turn: You can equip 1 monster from either GY to this card. This card can attack a number of times each Battle Phase, up to the number of Equip Cards equipped to it.
eff:
"Cyberdark Dragon" + "Cyber End Dragon"
Must be either Fusion Summoned, or Special Summoned by Tributing 1 Level 10 or lower "Cyberdark" Fusion Monster equipped with "Cyber End Dragon". Unaffected by your opponent's activated effects. Once per turn: You can equip 1 monster from either GY to this card. This card can attack a number of times each Battle Phase, up to the number of Equip Cards equipped to it.

action: Tributes Fusion Materials for Contact Fusion
Equips monsters from the player's Graveyard to itself
Equips monsters from the opponent's Graveyard to itself
mst: Unaffected by the opponent's card effects
summoning: Requires Fusion Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires only specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
Can be Special Summoned either by Fusion Summon or Contact Fusion
Contact Fusion without listed Fusion Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
